subject: WM-0145 ready for review
body: Recorded Owner product UX blocker and self-correction; incorporated art-thread feedback; reopened product UX remediation in project-state; created non-executed WM-0146..WM-0156 DAG centered on visible NPC action, authoritative lamp/build command-job flow, information hierarchy repair and visual evidence; handoff, taskctl validate/status and diff check pass; no product implementation or release/platform gate changes.
